name: Bacon-Wrapped and Cheddar Stuffed Dogs
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces cheddar cheese, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Pat the frankfurters dry.
3. In a skillet, cook the bacon for 3 minutes or until it is still pliable and not crisp. Transfer to paper towels to drain.
4. Cut a 1/2-inch slit lengthwise from end to end of each frankfurter.
5. Stuff each frankfurter with the cheese.
6. Wrap each frankfurter entirely with 2 slices of bacon, securing with toothpicks.
7. Place the prepared frankfurters on a rack over a baking pan or on a broiler pan.
8. Broil the frankfurters until the bacon is crispy, about 2 to 3 minutes.
9. Serve in rolls.
Yield: 4 stuffed frankfurters
